normalized_question_text:
A three-phase synchronous generator is to be connected to the infinite bus. The lamps are connected as shown in the figure for synchronization. The phase sequence of bus voltage is R-Y-B and that of incoming generator voltage is R'-Y'-B'.

It was found that the lamps are becoming dark in the sequence \(L_a - L_b - L_c\). It means that the phase sequence of the incoming generator is ______.
normalized_answer_text: opposite to infinite bus and its frequency is more than infinite bus

normalized_choice_map.A: opposite to infinite bus and its frequency is more than infinite bus
normalized_choice_map.B: opposite to infinite bus but its frequency is less than infinite bus
normalized_choice_map.C: same as infinite bus and its frequency is more than infinite bus
normalized_choice_map.D: same as infinite bus and its frequency is less than infinite bus
